title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bajaj Electricals

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Bajaj Electricals
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
